title: SDLC Relation Edge
description: A typed relation between two records. Encodes the edge tuple (u, r, v, w, t, p) from the position paper: source, relation, target, confidence weight, temporal validity, and provenance.

source.description: Record id of the relation head u.

relation.description: Relation type r from the relation set R.

target.description: Record id of the relation tail v.

confidence.description: Weight w in [0,1]. Automatically mined edges should reflect noise with lower confidence than human-labeled or directly observed edges.

valid_from.description: Commit sha or ISO-8601 timestamp at which this relation becomes valid. Used to prevent temporal leakage.

valid_until.description: Commit sha or ISO-8601 timestamp after which this relation no longer holds. Null means currently valid.

provenance.description: Edge provenance. The 'method' field is required on edges to record the extraction channel.
